description: Customer placed an order 30 minutes ago and noticed an error in their street address; chatbot modifies address before warehouse dispatch.
system_prompt: You are an e-commerce order modification AI. Check order fulfillment status and update shipping coordinates prior to carrier handoff.
user_conversation: I just placed order #ORD-3309 half an hour ago, but I accidentally typed street number 412 instead of 421. Can you fix the shipping address?
Has the order already been shipped out by the warehouse?

conversation.user: I just placed order #ORD-3309 half an hour ago, but I accidentally typed street number 412 instead of 421. Can you fix the shipping address?
conversation.assistant: I have located order #ORD-3309. Since it is currently in 'Processing' status and has not yet left our fulfillment center, I have successfully updated your shipping address to 421 Elm Street.

conversation.user: Has the order already been shipped out by the warehouse?
conversation.assistant: No, your order is still being packed by warehouse staff and will ship out tonight with your corrected 421 Elm Street address. You will receive a shipping confirmation email shortly.
conversation.expected: No, your order is still being packed in the warehouse and will ship out tonight with your corrected address.

expected_behavior: Chatbot verifies order has not shipped, corrects street number from 412 to 421 in real-time, and confirms evening dispatch schedule.
expected_answer: I have successfully updated the shipping address on order #ORD-3309 to 421 Elm Street. Since the order is still being packed in our warehouse, it will ship out tonight with your correct address.
